title: IGNITE — Adjoining Suites (Her & Him)
description: Explicit peak scene with sustained dirty talk and dense he said / she said tags.
text:
The sheets were tangled at their feet. His hands found her hips without ceremony — and she let him, breath catching against his mouth.

"Don't stop," she said.

"I wasn't going to," he said. He pushed her onto the mattress, the frame creaking under them.

"Tell me what you want," he said.

"You know what I want," she said.

"Say it," he said.

"I want your mouth on me," she said. "I want you inside me. Now."

He didn't make her wait. He slid down her body, breath hot against her thigh, and when his tongue found her she arched off the bed with a sound she didn't recognise.

"Like that?" he said.

"Yes—there," she said.

He lifted his head. "Turn over," he said.

She rolled onto her stomach, shoulders trembling. His hands spread her open, slow and deliberate, and then he was pressing into her from behind — thick, relentless, exactly what she had been asking for.

"Harder," she said.

"You sure?" he said.

"Don't ask me again," she said.

He gripped her hips and gave her what she asked for. The room filled with skin and breath and the wet friction of bodies that had stopped pretending hours ago.

"Look at me," he said.

She twisted until she could see his face — dark eyes, jaw tight, completely undone.

"I mean it," she said. "Don't stop."
